message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
actor "Time" as Time
participant "tradecenter" as tradecenter
participant "wms" as wms
participant "合作商仓储系统" as 合作商仓储系统
participant "Aftership" as Aftership

Time -> tradecenter: [030] 定时推送运单
wms <-right 合作商仓储系统: [010] 回传发货信息imei运单号等
wms -> wms: [020] 生成运单信息
wms -> Aftership: [040] 推送运单至aftership
Aftership -> wms: [050] 推送路由轨迹信息
wms -> wms: [060] 轨迹处理和封装
wms -> wms: [070] 记录运单信息更新状态

alt [路由最终状态]
  wms <-right tradecenter: [080] 通知订单发货单的路由状态
else [非最终状态]
end

@enduml
